perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with three men sitting on a couch in a room that looks like a subway carriage interior, talking to the camera. (2) A woman with twin braids appears in a brightly lit studio holding a microphone, seemingly ready to sing. (3) The scene switches between the woman and a man in the studio singing, and the three men on the couch reacting, laughing, and holding up small paddles with faces on them. (4) Split-screen editing is frequently used to show the performers and the reactors simultaneously. (5) In the final segment, all five individuals stand together in the studio; one man holds a small whiteboard with concert information while they all wave and cheer towards the camera.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy Mandarin speech with laughter and overlapping voices as the group introduces the challenge. (2) Segments of various Mandarin pop songs are sung, sometimes off-key for comedic effect, followed by loud laughter and SFX like 'boing' or 'ding'. (3) Background music is generally upbeat and lighthearted, matching the variety show atmosphere. (4) The final part features a synchronized group shout/chant promoting a concert, accompanied by the sound of cheering and light studio ambient noise.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional subtitles translate the spoken dialogue throughout the video. (2) Decorative variety-show style captions like '音癡挑戰' (Tone Deaf Challenge) and '完敗!' (Total Defeat!) appear to emphasize comedic moments. (3) Song titles like '魔鬼中的天使' and '癡心絕對' are displayed during performances. (4) Promotional text at the end includes '台北小巨蛋' (Taipei Arena) and '6/7 正式售票' (Tickets officially on sale June 7th).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Singing Challenge Rounds -> Performance Reactions -> Concert Promotion

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 5 main participants (4 men, 1 woman) and 1 staff member briefly visible in the background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A female host with twin braids in a white tank top and ripped jeans; four young men in casual streetwear (flannels, t-shirts, cargo pants).

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A studio with a wooden floor and white walls; a secondary set designed to look like the inside of a subway train with green poles and seats.

audio_production_style.audioTransition: Hard cuts synchronized with visual transitions

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Intro -> Sequential Challenge Rounds -> Culmination/Outro
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is an entertainment piece designed to engage fans of the influencer 'Chien Chien' and the band 'Ideal Bastards' (理想混蛋) through a 'Tone Deaf' singing challenge. It uses a humorous, high-energy variety show format to entertain the audience while effectively acting as a promotional vehicle for the band's upcoming concert at the Taipei Arena.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct promotion of a concert with date, time, and venue information on a whiteboard at the end.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-pitched variety-style reaction captions; Chien Chien's signature twin-braid hairstyle.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video leverages the chemistry between a popular food/lifestyle influencer and a music band to cross-pollinate their audiences.
